Urgot.trading_pattern: Urgot's W constant autos and E fear dominate early. He pokes with Q safely. You can't trade back effectively.
Urgot.ability_to_dodge: His E fear + grab — move sideways when charging. If grabbed, you're pulled and destroyed.

power_spikes.you: Level 6 (Q scaling into late), Frozen Heart (armor stacking)

Urgot.early_game: You lose all trades pre-6. Play safe, farm passively, let him push. Never all-in him.
Urgot.mid_game: He R executes you if low. Stay above 40% HP always. Your Q stacks aren't enough to duel him yet.
Urgot.late_game: Full stacks let you duel, but his poke resets you. Teamfight grouped. Don't isolate.
Urgot.win_condition: Survive early, stack Q safely. Teamfight with armor items to survive his R. Never duel.
Urgot.scaling: Urgot outscales through R execute. You scale through stacks but lose to execute.
Urgot.positioning: Stay far from walls to avoid E pull. Don't extend into river.

Yorick.trading_pattern: Yorick summons minions to damage you. His ghouls swarm you quickly. Extended trades lose to minion damage.
Yorick.ability_to_dodge: His E minion spawn — when he targets you, move sideways. Don't let him spawn ghouls on you.
Yorick.early_game: Yorick's ghouls are oppressive. He pressure you constantly. Play safe and farm Q passively.
Yorick.mid_game: His maiden plus ghouls destroy you in extended fights. Teamfight grouped where ghouls are weak.
Yorick.late_game: He's a split-pushing god. You can't duel him 1v1. Force grouped fights; never let him split.
Yorick.win_condition: Survive early stacking Q. Teamfight grouped. Don't isolate or split against him.
Yorick.scaling: Yorick outscales dramatically — split pusher god late. You scale through stacks.
Yorick.positioning: Stay spread to reduce ghoul swarm damage. Back away from his E targeting.

Briar.trading_pattern: Briar all-ins with W and E rapidly. She has high damage and healing. You can't duel her early.
Briar.ability_to_dodge: Her E leap — move perpendicular when she charges at you. Back away or she heals off your damage.
Briar.early_game: She's incredibly strong early. All her abilities heal. Play safe and don't trade.
Briar.mid_game: She needs items for damage. Your stacks growing helps. Teamfight instead of 1v1.
Briar.late_game: Full stacks let you duel, but she heals through your damage. Stick to grouped fights.
Briar.win_condition: Survive early with passive farming. Don't get caught alone. Teamfight grouped.
Briar.scaling: Briar scales well through healing. You scale through stacks.
Briar.positioning: Kite away from her E leap. Don't let her close and all-in.

Shen.trading_pattern: Shen's E taunt interrupts your Q. His W tankiness neutralizes your damage. You can't all-in him.
Shen.ability_to_dodge: His E taunt — move perpendicular to his charge. The taunt duration is long; avoid his path.
Shen.early_game: Shen is tanky and has good engage. Play safe, stack Q, avoid his E taunt.
Shen.mid_game: His ult makes him a teamfight god. You scale slower. Group for fights; don't split.
Shen.late_game: He's a tank support. You're a damage dealer. Teamfight grouped.
Shen.win_condition: Stack Q passively. Teamfight grouped with team. Avoid his E taunt.
Shen.scaling: Shen scales as a tank. You scale as a damage dealer.
Shen.positioning: Avoid walking into narrow passages for E taunt. Space from minion clusters.

Pantheon.trading_pattern: Pantheon spears poke constantly from range. His E stun blocks your Q. You can't trade effectively.
Pantheon.ability_to_dodge: His E spear stun — move sideways to dodge. His range is too great early.
Pantheon.early_game: Pantheon outpokes and outzones you. Play safe, minimize trades, farm with Q.
Pantheon.mid_game: Your stacks growing help dueling. He roams for kills. Teamfight instead of 1v1.
Pantheon.late_game: You outscale him as a duelist. Force fights where he's caught.
Pantheon.win_condition: Survive poke, stack passively. Outscale into mid-game. Duel when ahead on stacks.
Pantheon.scaling: You outscale — Pantheon is an early game bully. Survive early.
Pantheon.positioning: Hide behind minions for poke reduction. Don't extend into river.

Garen.trading_pattern: Garen Q silence shuts down your combo. His Judgment AOE is oppressive. Avoid extended trades.
Garen.ability_to_dodge: His Q silence — when he winds up, back away. Silence prevents your Q usage.

power_spikes.you: Level 9 (Q stacking into mid), Trinity Force

Garen.early_game: Garen's silence and tankiness are rough. Play safe, stack Q, avoid his Judgment.
Garen.mid_game: Your Q spam speeds up stacking. He becomes less relevant. Duel him if ahead.
Garen.late_game: You outscale as a duelist. Force isolated fights where you have the advantage.
Garen.win_condition: Survive early, stack Q passively. Outscale into late game dueling.
Garen.scaling: You outscale significantly — full stacks beat Garen.
Garen.positioning: Hug minions to minimize Judgment damage. Back away when he winds up.

Malphite.trading_pattern: Malphite is tanky but low damage. Your Q outpokes him. Extended trades favor you gradually.
Malphite.ability_to_dodge: His E shockwave — move away when he casts. It reduces armor but doesn't prevent Q stacking.
Malphite.early_game: You can trade with Q poke. Malphite scales to a teamfight god. Farm and stack Q.
Malphite.mid_game: Your stacks growing help. His R is powerful grouped. Teamfight when ahead.
Malphite.late_game: He outscales as a tank. You scale as a duelist. Split push if ahead.
Malphite.win_condition: Stack Q early. Duel him if ahead on stacks. Force teamfights when grouped.
Malphite.scaling: Even — both scale but in different directions.
Malphite.positioning: Trade with Q poke at range. Don't let him group and R engage.

Vayne.trading_pattern: Vayne's range and tumble let her kite. She applies true damage. Extended trades favor her early.
Vayne.ability_to_dodge: Her E condemn stun — move away from walls. Never stand near walls; she'll stun you.
Vayne.early_game: Vayne's weak early. Pressure and look for kills. She scales to a monster.
Vayne.mid_game: Her items make her scale fast. Your Q helps counter her. Duel if ahead.
Vayne.late_game: She's a hypercarry late. You can duel if full stacks, but she's dangerous.
Vayne.win_condition: Kill her early. Get a lead. Duel her with full stacks when ahead.
Vayne.scaling: Vayne outscales as a hypercarry. Win early.
Vayne.positioning: Stay away from walls. Don't let her condemn you easily.

Kayle.trading_pattern: Kayle farms early with Q. She's weak to all-ins. Trade when she walks up carelessly.
Kayle.ability_to_dodge: Her W healing — focus her down before she heals. Her range increases with levels.
Kayle.early_game: She's weak. Pressure and look for kills. Don't let her farm for free.
Kayle.mid_game: She scales fast with items. Your Q is relevant. Duel when ahead.
Kayle.late_game: She becomes unkillable late. You need early leads.
Kayle.win_condition: Abuse early weakness. All-in at level 1-3. Don't let her scale.
Kayle.positioning: Stay close to all-in. Don't let her farm safely.

Mordekaiser.trading_pattern: Mordekaiser has high burst at level 3+. His E pull is strong. You can't fight him early all-in.
Mordekaiser.ability_to_dodge: His E pull — move perpendicular when he casts. Stay at range to minimize risk.
Mordekaiser.early_game: He's strong early all-in. Play safe, minimize trades, stack Q.
Mordekaiser.mid_game: Your Q stacks help dueling. He scales through items. Teamfight instead of 1v1.
Mordekaiser.late_game: You can duel if full stacks. His teamfight ult is powerful. Fight grouped.
Mordekaiser.win_condition: Survive early, stack Q. Outscale into late. Duel when full stacks.
Mordekaiser.scaling: You outscale through stacks. Mordekaiser scales through items.
Mordekaiser.positioning: Stay at range to avoid E pull. Don't extend alone.

Ornn.trading_pattern: Ornn is tanky but slow. Your Q trades effectively. Extended trades are even early.
Ornn.ability_to_dodge: His R knockback — move sideways to avoid. It interrupts your combos.
Ornn.early_game: Trade with Q poke. He's tanky but not overwhelming. Farm and scale.
Ornn.mid_game: Your stacks help. His item upgrades help. Teamfight instead of isolated duels.
Ornn.late_game: You can duel if full stacks. He's a tank support. Fight grouped.
Ornn.win_condition: Stack Q early. Duel when ahead. Teamfight grouped.
Ornn.scaling: Even — both scale in different directions.
Ornn.positioning: Trade at range with Q. Avoid his R knockback.

Teemo.trading_pattern: Teemo pokes from range with Q. He's invisible in shrooms. Extended trades favor you after level 6.
Teemo.ability_to_dodge: His Q blind — move unpredictably. When blinded, all-in his next trade hard.
Teemo.early_game: Teemo pokes safely from range. All-in him hard when he walks up. He's weak to pressure.
Teemo.mid_game: Your stacks help counter his poke. His shrooms are annoying. Teamfight grouped.
Teemo.late_game: He splits and shrooms. You duel better. Force fights when you can.
Teemo.win_condition: All-in him early levels. Stack Q to counter poke. Never let him split freely.
Teemo.scaling: You outscale through stacks. Teemo scales through split push.
Teemo.positioning: Rush him to all-in. Don't let him poke safely at range.

Jayce.trading_pattern: Jayce's range form pokes safely. Gate form all-in is strong. You can't trade back effectively early.
Jayce.ability_to_dodge: His shockwave — move sideways. His gate form jump is quick; be ready.
Jayce.early_game: Jayce outpokes from range. Play safe, minimize trades, stack Q.
Jayce.mid_game: Your Q stacks help dueling. He roams for kills. Teamfight instead of 1v1.
Jayce.late_game: You outscale as a duelist. Force fights where he's caught.
Jayce.win_condition: Survive poke, stack passively. Outscale into late. Duel when ahead.
Jayce.scaling: You outscale through stacks. Jayce is an early-game bully.
Jayce.positioning: Hide behind minions for poke reduction. Don't extend into river.

Aatrox.trading_pattern: Aatrox Q swings deal high damage and heal him. Extended trades favor him. Trade short when Q is down.
Aatrox.ability_to_dodge: His Q swings — dodge by moving perpendicular. Avoid standing in swings.
Aatrox.early_game: Aatrox's Q swings are strong. Play safe, stack Q, avoid all-ins.
Aatrox.mid_game: Your stacks help. His items help. Teamfight instead of 1v1.
Aatrox.late_game: You can duel if full stacks. His teamfight is decent. Fight grouped.
Aatrox.win_condition: Stack Q early. Outscale into mid-late. Duel when full stacks.
Aatrox.positioning: Dodge his Q swings by moving sideways. Don't stand in a line with him.

Volibear.trading_pattern: Volibear has strong all-in with W and E. He heals through fights. Trade short when his abilities are down.
Volibear.ability_to_dodge: His E flip — move perpendicular. If flipped, he all-ins you with W.
Volibear.early_game: Volibear all-in is strong. Play safe around his E. Farm and stack Q.
Volibear.mid_game: Your stacks help dueling. His teamfight is decent. Duel if ahead.
Volibear.late_game: You can duel if full stacks. He's a tank. Force fights when grouped.
Volibear.win_condition: Stack Q early. Duel when ahead. Teamfight grouped.
Volibear.scaling: Even — both scale in different directions.
Volibear.positioning: Avoid his E flip by moving sideways. Don't stand in clumps.

Trundle.trading_pattern: Trundle's W sustain and Q bite outdamage early. His R steals stats. You can't duel him early.
Trundle.ability_to_dodge: His R pillar — position away from it. It blocks and damages. His Q is a short-range bite.
Trundle.early_game: Trundle's all-in is strong. Play safe, minimize trades, stack Q.
Trundle.mid_game: Your stacks help. His items help. Teamfight instead of 1v1.
Trundle.late_game: You can duel if full stacks. His tankiness is high. Force fights grouped.
Trundle.win_condition: Stack Q early. Outscale into late. Duel when full stacks.
Trundle.scaling: You outscale through stacks. Trundle through items.
Trundle.positioning: Avoid his R pillar. Don't let him all-in easily.

Illaoi.trading_pattern: Illaoi's E spirit grab deals massive damage with tentacles. Extended trades favor her. Play around tentacle spawns.
Illaoi.ability_to_dodge: Her E spirit grab — dodge by moving sideways. If hit, you fight at massive disadvantage.
Illaoi.early_game: Illaoi is strong early. Play around tentacles. Avoid her E.
Illaoi.mid_game: Her tentacles are still oppressive. Your stacks help counter. Teamfight grouped.
Illaoi.late_game: You can duel if full stacks. She's strong 1v1. Force fights grouped.
Illaoi.win_condition: Stack Q safely. Avoid her E. Teamfight grouped.
Illaoi.positioning: Space from tentacles. Avoid her E completely.

Riven.trading_pattern: Riven's Q-AA-Q combos are oppressive. She outbursts early. Trade short when her abilities are down.
Riven.ability_to_dodge: Her R — when she uses it, back away. It grants range and damage.
Riven.early_game: Riven is strong early. Play safe, minimize trades, stack Q.
Riven.mid_game: Your stacks help. Her items help. Teamfight instead of 1v1.
Riven.late_game: You can duel if full stacks. Her split push is strong. Force fights grouped.
Riven.win_condition: Stack Q early. Outscale into late. Duel when full stacks.
Riven.scaling: You outscale through stacks. Riven early-game focused.
Riven.positioning: Space from her Q-AA combos. Don't stand in a line.

Olaf.trading_pattern: Olaf Q spam is relentless early. He deals high damage. You can't trade back effectively early.
Olaf.ability_to_dodge: His Q axes — dodge by moving sideways. His R makes him unstoppable.
Olaf.early_game: Olaf outpokes with Q spam. Play safe, minimize trades, stack Q.
Olaf.mid_game: Your stacks help. His all-in is still strong. Teamfight instead of 1v1.
Olaf.late_game: You can duel if full stacks. His teamfight is decent. Force fights grouped.
Olaf.win_condition: Stack Q early. Outscale into late. Duel when full stacks.
Olaf.scaling: You outscale through stacks. Olaf early-game focused.
Olaf.positioning: Dodge his Q axes by moving sideways. Don't extend.

Fiora.trading_pattern: Fiora parries your Q. She dashes in with range. Short trades are risky. Play around her Parry.
Fiora.ability_to_dodge: Her Riposte — bait it with a fake ability, then Q for real. She blocks burst if predictable.
Fiora.early_game: Fiora is strong early. Play safe, minimize trades, stack Q.
Fiora.mid_game: Your stacks help. She splits well. Teamfight instead of isolated duel.
Fiora.late_game: You can duel if full stacks. She's an assassin split pusher. Force fights grouped.
Fiora.win_condition: Stack Q. Teamfight grouped. Never isolate against her.
Fiora.scaling: Fiora outscales as a split pusher. You scale through teamfights.
Fiora.positioning: Don't overextend alone. Stay grouped for fights.

Darius.trading_pattern: Darius Q outer ring applies bleed. Extended trades favor him. You can't out-trade early.
Darius.ability_to_dodge: His Q bleed — walk at him or away from outer ring. Standing in outer ring is terrible.
Darius.early_game: Darius is strong. Play safe, minimize fights, stack Q.
Darius.mid_game: Your stacks help dueling. His items help. Duel if ahead.
Darius.late_game: You can duel if full stacks. His ult is dangerous. Force fights grouped.
Darius.win_condition: Stack Q early. Outscale into late. Duel when full stacks.
Darius.scaling: You outscale through stacks. Darius through ult utility.
Darius.positioning: Walk at him to avoid Q outer ring. Don't extend.

Gnar.trading_pattern: Gnar mini-form pokes early. Mega all-in is oppressive. Trade when he's mini and weakened.
Gnar.ability_to_dodge: His mega transformation — brace for impact. His R knockback is strong.
Gnar.early_game: Gnar is strong early. Play safe, minimize trades, stack Q.
Gnar.mid_game: Your stacks help. His form cycling helps. Duel when he's mini.
Gnar.late_game: You can duel if full stacks. He's a teamfighter. Force fights grouped.
Gnar.win_condition: Stack Q early. Duel when full stacks. Teamfight grouped.
Gnar.positioning: Target him when mini. Avoid when mega.
